hero.title:
Architectural Glass &
Aluminium Systems
hero.subtitle: Design, fabrication, and installation — with online ordering and real-time pricing.

about.title:
Transform A Space for Work,
Into A Space for Life
about.desc: HAGX is a design, fabrication, and installation team for architectural glass and aluminium systems — built for precision, clarity, and lasting quality.

whatwedo.title:
Precision Glass & Aluminium,
From Survey to Handover
whatwedo.desc: HAGX offers end-to-end services from site survey, design, fabrication, and installation — plus premium material supply for teams who need individual orders.

strategy.title:
Bold Design.
Clear Strategy.
Dependable Results.
strategy.desc: HAGX was built on the belief that great glass and aluminium work comes from a single team that understands materials, structure, and the job site. We are an integrated total solutions provider delivering architectural-grade quality — from small projects to full Curtain Wall systems.

curtain_wall.title: Curtain Wall System
curtain_wall.desc: Unitized Curtain Wall system for a premium office development using Low-E Double Glazing with Thermal Break profiles — fully managed by the HAGX team.

glass_facade.title: Glass Facade
glass_facade.desc: Full-height glass facade with integrated sliding and casement systems, optimising sea views and natural light while harmonising with the existing concrete structure.

partition.title: Interior Partition
partition.desc: Frameless Glass Partition system with integrated sliding doors and ceiling connection details, enabling flexible and elegant workspace division.

cta.title:
Bring Your Vision to Life —
Connect with HAGX Today
cta.desc: Send us your project details and our team will assess the approach, materials, and budget — at no cost.

installation.title: Custom Installation
installation.body: Site survey, drawings, material sourcing, in-house fabrication, and installation — all managed by the HAGX team end-to-end.

supply.title: Premium Supply
supply.body: Order glass, aluminium profiles, and hardware individually — at factory prices, ready to ship, with custom sizing available.

contact.title:
Ready to Design
Your Space?
contact.desc: Our team will assess your approach, materials, and preliminary budget — free of charge.
contact.testimonial: The HAGX team managed the project from start to finish, delivered on time, and the result exceeded our expectations.

success.desc: The HAGX team will get back to you within 1 business day.
